name: Role-Based Research Crew
description: Three agents in sequence: researcher gathers findings, analyst interprets them, writer produces the final report. Task context is passed explicitly via context_from edges — the CrewAI Task.context model.

research_findings.description: Raw research findings from researcher agent

agents.backstory: An expert at gathering accurate, up-to-date information from diverse sources. Produces well-sourced factual summaries.
agents.goal: Find comprehensive, accurate information on the given topic.

agents.backstory: Turns raw research into sharp analytical insights. Identifies patterns, implications, and knowledge gaps.
agents.goal: Interpret research findings and produce a structured analysis with key implications.

agents.backstory: Translates complex research and analysis into clear, well-structured reports for executive audiences.
agents.goal: Produce a polished, well-structured report integrating all findings and analysis.

crew_shared.description: Shared store for the writer agent — holds intermediate findings for the duration of the run

web_search.description: Search the web for recent information on a topic

config.task_description:
Research the following topic thoroughly. Use web search to find recent, accurate information. Cite your sources.

Topic: {{$.state.topic}}
config.expected_output: A comprehensive set of research findings: at least 5 key points with sources, covering recent developments, key players, and open questions.

config.task_description: Analyse the research findings provided in context. Identify the 3 most important implications, any contradictions or gaps, and a recommended direction for the report.
config.expected_output: A structured analysis: key implications (3), knowledge gaps (1-3), recommended report direction (1 paragraph).

config.task_description:
Using the research findings and analysis provided in context, write a polished executive report on the topic: {{$.state.topic}}.

The report should have: an executive summary, key findings, analysis and implications, and a conclusion.
config.expected_output: A polished report: executive summary (150 words), key findings (bullet list), analysis (3 paragraphs), conclusion (100 words). No hallucinated facts — only content grounded in the provided context.
